What makes us different?
![](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/wp-content/uploads/2017/10/strategy.png)
###  We build strong strategies
We focused on building strategies through partnerships with local and regional stakeholders.
![](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/wp-content/uploads/2017/10/islam.png)
###  We have launched the first Islamic private equity investment fund
We have launched the first Islamic private equity investment fund in the country during the year 2012.
![](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/wp-content/uploads/2017/10/za.png)
###  We are a leading actor in venture capital
We are a leading actor in venture capital by providing innovative companies and startups with adequate and optimal financial tools and proper follow up.

What we do
[ ![](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/wp-content/uploads/2017/10/1.png) PRIVATE EQUITY & VENTURE CAPITAL  Private Equity and Venture Capital refer to a general partnership formed by a Private Equity firms investing in Private Companies.  ](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/what-we-do/private-equity-and-venture-capital/)
[ ![](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/wp-content/uploads/2017/10/2-1.png) CAPITAL MARKET  UGFS-NA delivers a diversified range of quality investment products and services in order to meet the needs of our institutional and retail clients.  ](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/what-we-do/capital-market/)
[ ![](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/wp-content/uploads/2017/10/3.png) INVESTMENT ADVISORY  UGAS is a subsidiary of UGFS-NA, was established on June 2010 and licensed in 2013 by the Tunisian Capital Market Authorities CMF as a listing sponsor.  ](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/what-we-do/investment-advisory/)
[ ![](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/wp-content/uploads/2017/10/Sans-titre-4.png) CORPORATE FINANCE  We offer corporate finance advisory services to assist with major transactions in the capital markets.  ](https://www.ugfsnorthafrica.com.tn/what-we-do/investment-advisory/)
